description.overview: The Chesapeake Bay Retriever is the toughest of all retrievers, bred to retrieve ducks in the icy waters of Chesapeake Bay. They're loyal and protective.
description.history: The Chesapeake Bay Retriever originated in United States.
description.temperament: Known for being affectionate, bright, sensitive.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their wavy, oily double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Chesapeake Bay Retriever is the toughest of all retrievers, bred to retrieve ducks in the icy waters of Chesapeake Bay. They're loyal and protective.
